inputs: Three tiny deterministic prompt tasks: two fixed-value extractions and one arithmetic answer.
outputs: Model text graded by exact-match rubrics only. No judge model is called.
decision: Tracer bullet for the Crucible author-run-grade-store-compare loop over real OpenRouter models, without Threshold or judge-model calls.

config.system_prompt: You are running an exact-match benchmark. For every task, output exactly the requested answer and nothing else. No markdown, no quotes, no explanation.

tasks.prompt: Fixed input: CODE=crucible-711. Return exactly the value after CODE=.
Fixed input: checksum=9b74c9897bac770ffc029102a200c5de. Return exactly the checksum value.
Return exactly the integer sum of 19 and 23.
